subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Pen! Verily We have revealed unto thee in every circumstance that which sufficeth all the worlds. Blessed art thou for having arisen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم الاعلی قد نزلنا لک فی کل شان ما یکفی العالمین طوبی لک بما قمت علی
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
